title: Cave Dweller Cave Sounds
description: Makes the Cave Dweller sound off in the caves, but without actually being there.
body:
Horror mods have grown on me, but they might still not be your cup of tea. While that's fine, what if you wanted some aspect in vanilla? With this pack, the cave sounds are replaced with the four noises from Gargin's original Cave Dweller mod. That's it.

Original Cave Dweller mod:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller
